summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected. Eight open non-security PRs are kept independent for maintainer/backlog handling, #52664 is routed to central security handling, and already-closed #91958 is left closed.

actions.reason: Legitimate standalone PR surface, but current proof/check state blocks merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout.
Independent automation/test-infrastructure PR; keep open for author/maintainer follow-up rather than closing or merging in this shard.
Useful standalone bug-fix PR with proof, but dirty merge state blocks any merge recommendation.
Broad standalone maintainer/backlog PR with unresolved review and check blockers; not appropriate for closeout or merge planning in this shard.
Already closed in live preflight state; no mutation should be emitted.
Focused standalone exec config PR, but unresolved review evidence blocks merge and it is not a duplicate/close candidate.
Exact security-sensitive item identified by the preflight artifact; route only this PR and continue classifying unrelated refs.
Apparently clean standalone PR, but merge is blocked by job policy and no closure is warranted.
Useful standalone linked PR, but maintainer rebase signal and check failure block merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout.
Substantive standalone ACPX provider PR with proof and unresolved review feedback; keep open for author/maintainer follow-up.
